title: xanthoxalis breviramulosa
intro: Xanthoxalis breviramulosa, also known as the yellow salsify or wood sorrel, is a perennial plant in the Oxalis genus. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. In herbal preparations, Xanthoxalis breviramulosa is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be consumed raw as a salad green or used as a garnish.
